title: Sticherus loheri

intro: Sticherus loheri, also known as the Loher's rachis fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Sticherus loheri are believed to be responsible for its ability to modulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which may help protect against various diseases.
